textDisplay: Literally nothing at all happens in this. There's no plot other than a typical father son hang out type shit. There's no real antagonist, just random jump scares from meaningless ghosts. There's no threat or motivation behind the ghosts either. They aren't trying to do anything to anyone  other than scare the audience. Then it ends. No conclusion. No defeated main antagonist. Legit, 4 jump scares in a plot less movie, then the end. Let me break it down. New friends hang out, get spooked a few times, dad gets spooked a few times, it goes away, movies over. (No spoilers here, as there are non) oh and also, the scary horror parts, collectively last about 4 minutes of screen time, the rest are just jumbled repeated shots of random things from past movies. No structure, almost like a messy montage of random. Scenes don't lead into the next, as AGAIN. There's no story here.

textDisplay: All time classic 👏❤ This Franchise introduced paranormal horror and scary genre in the most profound way possible. So many references and knowledge that actually exist in religious books. There have been many paranormal stories consisting of a family being haunted but none come close to how incredible INSIDIOUS is. Lin Shaye has become a medium for us all who introduced us to the world of 'The Further'. Insidious has portrayed the exact vision and even feeling of dread and what true horror is. The way it coiled me into the story since the first chapter is unbreakable. This franchise is much more than jump scares, blood, gore and violence. It's something that's not human or human made but a world of entities that we can only study and try to save ourselves from. The dread and loneliness of that world gets to you as u realise you're gonna be there one day... Truly a masterpiece 🙌
